seoTitle: How to Add an Image in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to insert images into ticket replies or knowledge base articles in Freshdesk to make your content clearer.
intro: Images can make a reply or help article far easier to understand than text alone. This guide covers how to add an image inside Freshdesk's editor.

steps.heading: Open the editor
steps.body: Go to the ticket reply box or knowledge base article editor where you want to add the image.

steps.heading: Find the image insert option
steps.body: Look for an image icon in the editor's toolbar.

steps.heading: Upload or paste the image
steps.body: Upload an image file from your computer or paste it directly if your editor supports that.

steps.heading: Adjust and save
steps.body: Resize or position the image as needed, then save or send your reply or article.

faq.question: Can I paste a screenshot directly into a reply?
faq.answer: Many rich text editors, including Freshdesk's, support pasting images directly from your clipboard.

faq.question: What image file types are supported?
faq.answer: Common formats like JPG and PNG are generally supported for uploads.

faq.question: Is there a file size limit for images?
faq.answer: Yes, Freshdesk enforces attachment size limits, so very large images may need to be compressed first.

faq.question: Can I add images to knowledge base articles too?
faq.answer: Yes, the same image insertion tools are available when editing knowledge base articles.
